name: Sasseur Real Estate Investment Trust
summary: Sasseur Real Estate Investment Trust invests in a portfolio of real estate and related assets. The company operates through four segments: Chongqing Outlets, Bishan Outlets, Hefei Outlets, and Kunming Outlets. Its property portfolio comprises four retail outlet malls covering a gross floor area of 377,737 square meters located in the People's Republic of China. The company is based in Singapore. Sasseur Real Estate Investment Trust is a subsidiary of Sasseur Cayman Holding II.
